title: GivePet
description: Safely transfer pet ownership to other players.
body:
![GivePet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1f59f0dbc8586e1e6a2873d3ce6ccf4f07fbe13.png)

**GivePet** allows players to seamlessly hand over ownership of their tamed friends. 🛡️ **100% Secure:** Only the *actual owner* of a tamed mob can initiate a transfer. No pet-napping allowed! --- ### Supported Mobs We support all vanilla `Tameable` entities and trust-based mobs: * 🐺 **Wolves & Cats** * 🦜 **Parrots** * 🐴 **Horses, Donkeys & Mules** * 🐪 **Llamas & Camels** * 💀 **Skeleton & Zombie Horses** * 🦊 **Foxes** (Trust-based) --- ### Commands | Command | Description | | :--- | :--- | | `👉 /givepet ` | Start an offer, then right-click your pet to send it. | | `❌ /givepet cancel` | Cancel your current selection or pending offer. | | `✅ /acceptpet ` | Accept an incoming pet transfer. | | `🚫 /declinepet ` | Decline an incoming pet transfer. | --- ### Permissions | Node | Default | Description | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | `givepet.use` | `true` | Access to start a pet transfer. | | `givepet.accept` | `true` | Access to accept a pet. | | `givepet.decline`| `true` | Access to decline a pet. | --- ### Metrics ![bStats Chart](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/GivePets.svg) --- ### 🛠️ Technical Details * **Java Baseline:** Java 8 (Compatible with Java 8, 11, 17, and 21). * **Supported Versions:** Minecraft 1.8, 1.12.2, 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.x, 1.20.x, 1.21.x, and latest snapshots. * **Supported Loaders:** Paper, Spigot, Bukkit, Folia, Purpur --- ### 💙 Perfect for: Survival • SMP • Events • Roleplay • Streamer-friendly servers
